steps.t: The brigand hideaway is located somewhere in the Brown Lands. Céola has asked you to scout the first patrol point for the location of the brigand hide…
The brigand hideaway is located somewhere in the Brown Lands. Céola has asked you to scout the second patrol point for the location of the brigand hid…
The brigand hideaway is located somewhere in the Brown Lands. Céola has asked you to scout the third patrol point for the location of the brigand hide…
The brigand hideaway is located somewhere in the Brown Lands. Céola has asked you to scout the fourth patrol point for the location of the brigand hid…
Céola is at Etheburg, south of Helstor, in the Brown Lands. You should return to Céola with news of your success.
